/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/v4l2_rga_rknn_detect_profile.dir/src/main_v4l2_rga_rknn_detect.cpp.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_rga_rknn_detect_profile.dir/src/postprocess_profile.cc.o CMakeFiles/v4l2_rga_rknn_detect_profile.dir/src/yolo11_profile.cc.o -o v4l2_rga_rknn_detect_profile  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/lib:\$ORIGIN/../lib:/home/cat/lubancat_ai_manual_code/example/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64" utils.out/libimageutils.a utils.out/libfileutils.a utils.out/libimagedrawing.a /usr/lib/aarch64-linux-gnu/librga.so /home/cat/lubancat_ai_manual_code/example/3rdparty/rknpu2/Linux/aarch64/librknnrt.so -ldl -lpthread /home/cat/lubancat_ai_manual_code/example/3rdparty/librga/Linux/aarch64/librga.a /home/cat/lubancat_ai_manual_code/example/3rdparty/jpeg_turbo/Linux/aarch64/libturbojpeg.a
